role: This directory aggregates the second-level components of the ArchSpine mirror system, providing a consolidated view of subsystem interactions.
responsibility: The components in this directory collectively manage the synchronization, validation, and routing of data across mirrored nodes, ensuring consistency and fault tolerance in the ArchSpine architecture.
